# Copilot Instructions

This file exists because GitHub Copilot auto-discovers it. The actual brief for any AI agent in this repo — Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Aider, all of them — is [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root. Read that first; it's the same content for every tool.
